title: Various World
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/544497/description_a300e873-3f25-4a59-b18d-305e26ed4122.png)

## About:
Various World - mod adding anything to enchant Minecraft. Mod(for Minecraft versions 1.16-1.20) adds new bosses, atmosphere biomes, aggressive mobs and mobs that can be your companions, new ores, decoration blocks, new dungeons to Minecraft's Overworld 


<details>
<summary>1.16.5-1.20.1 content</summary>

## Biomes:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/544497/description_a29b2889-c6a3-48f7-8001-383d7290e776.png)
Various World adds new unique biomes to Overworld, hot biomes such as Shiny Valley and Crystalic Forest, biome that protects itself Sculk Valley, Peaceful Wasteland - biome of Allays' inhabitation spawns and two underground biomes

## Bosses & Mobs:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/544497/description_2858b6a9-0f2a-4dee-9bcc-a4a8a8584046.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>1.21.+ content</summary>

Various World version 'r' - remake versions to make make mod less rpg but more vanilla+

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/544497/description_8487b540-1d34-4a7c-8d25-4c86fd4dfbab.png)

For remake(Minecraft 1.21.+) versions, aspect goes for quility and high compability support, enhance your tool with gem, share same potion with your friends in short area, and anything you can configurate

</details>
